name: Mocha Crinkles
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Instant espresso or Coffee granules
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the flour, cocoa, espresso (or coffee granules), baking soda, salt, and pepper.
2. In another medium bowl, beat together the brown sugar and oil with an electric mixer until well blended. Beat in the sour cream, egg, and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the brown sugar mixture until a soft dough forms. Shape the dough into a disc, cover, and refrigerate until firm (3 to 4 hours).
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Place powdered sugar in a shallow bowl.
5. Roll out the chilled dough into 1-inch pieces and shape them into balls. Dust each ball with powdered sugar.
6. Place the coated dough balls on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the tops of the cookies are firm to the touch. Do not overbake. Allow the cookies to cool completely on wire racks. Makes approximately 6 dozen cookies (1 cookie per serving).
Nutritional information: Calories 44 (30% calories from fat); Total fat 1g; Cholesterol 3mg; Sodium 28mg; Carbohydrates 7g; Dietary fiber 0g; Protein 0g; Calcium 7mg; Iron 1mg; Vitamin A 4RE; Vitamin C 0mg; Sugar trace. Exchange: 1/2 Starch/Bread.
